settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and email preferences.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Configure your language, time format, and notification settings.

language.title: Language & Region
language.description: Choose your display language and date/time format.

inApp.title: In-App Notifications
inApp.description: Choose the activities you want to monitor in real-time.
inApp.assetUpdateDesc: Notifications when assets are updated, received, or deleted.
inApp.maintenanceDesc: Reminders when an asset is approaching its maintenance schedule.
inApp.loanDesc: Notifications for loan requests, approvals, and returns.
inApp.transferDesc: Notifications for asset movement between divisions or locations.
inApp.systemDesc: System update announcements and important information.

email.title: Email Notifications
email.description: Manage summaries and reports sent to your email.
email.summaryDesc: Email summary of asset activity every business day.
email.alertDesc: Immediate email when an asset is lost, damaged, or overdue.
email.reportDesc: Send asset recap report at the beginning of each month.

push.title: Push Notifications
push.description: Enable browser notifications for live updates.
push.browserDesc: Allow the application to send notifications to your browser.
push.hint: Enable to receive real-time notifications even when the page is not open.

appearance.title: Appearance & Preferences
appearance.description: Customize the look and feel of the application.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose between light, dark, or follow your system preference.

color.title: Accent Color
color.description: Select the primary color used across buttons, links, and accents.

font.title: Font Family
font.description: Choose the typeface used throughout the interface.

sidebar.title: Sidebar Layout
sidebar.description: Choose the sidebar display style for the navigation.
sidebar.collapseDescription: Define how the sidebar behaves when collapsed.
